data.title: Pump Science: Latest compound EGS completed refund and launched on Pump Science platform
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Pump Science's latest compound project EGS officially announced that it has completed 91.83% of pre-sale refunds to pre-sale investors and launched on the Pump Science platform. It is reported that EGS is the first compound token launched on the Pump Science launch platform after Pump Science launched RIF and URO.

data.title: The White House clarifies Musk's identity, saying he is not an employee of the Government Efficiency Department
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Although the name Musk almost represents the newly established Government Efficiency Department in the eyes of the outside world, the White House clarified that Musk does not work for the department. Joshua Fisher, director of the White House Executive Office, said that Musk is a senior adviser to the president and his authority is not higher than that of other senior White House staff. Fisher said on Monday night that Musk's role should be separated from the Government Efficiency Department he supports.

data.title: White House Clarifies Elon Musk's Role Amid Government Efficiency Department Speculations
data.description: According to Odaily, the White House has clarified that Elon Musk is not employed by the newly established Government Efficiency Department, despite public perception suggesting otherwise. Joshua Fisher, the Director of the White House Administrative Office, stated that Musk serves as a senior advisor to U.S. President Donald Trump. Fisher emphasized that Musk's authority is not greater than that of other senior White House staff members. On Monday evening, Fisher highlighted the importance of distinguishing Musk's advisory role from the Government Efficiency Department he supports.

data.title: Libra coin co-founder claims to have bribed Argentine President Milley’s sister
data.description: According to CoinDesk, Hayden Davis, co-founder of the Libra token, claimed in a text message in December last year that he influenced the president's decision by bribing Karina Milei, the sister of Argentine President Javier Milei, and said, "I sent money to his sister, and he signed any documents I said and did what I wanted." Karina Milei is an important figure in Milei's government. She is currently the Secretary-General of the Argentine Presidential Palace and the sister of the current Argentine President Javier Milei. At present, neither Karina Milei's office nor Hayden Davis responded to requests for comment, and it is unclear whether the latter actually paid the funds.

data.title: Strategy announces $2 billion convertible note offering to fuel future bitcoin purchases
data.description:
Strategy acquired a total of approximately 258,320 BTC in 2024 and currently holds 478,740 BTC worth over $46 billion.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/341663/strategy-announces-2-billion-convertible-note-offering-to-fuel-future-bitcoin-purchases?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Starknet: Phase 2 of STRK staking is scheduled to start in Q2, and Phase 3 is scheduled to start in Q4
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Starknet posted on the X platform that "The second phase of STRK staking will begin in a few months (the second quarter of 2025). The main goal of the second phase is to allow validators to play an active role in staking and evaluate their activity before they assume a formal role in consensus. The third phase is planned to start in the fourth quarter of 2025. To achieve this goal, Starknet proposes to introduce validator block proofs and may include a commission increase function."

data.title: Crypto Custody Company BitGo Adds OTC Trading Business and Considers IPO
data.description:
Crypto custodian BitGo Inc. has launched a global over-the-counter (OTC) business for digital assets as it plans to go public. The expansion comes as demand for cryptocurrencies grows among institutional investors, such as hedge funds. 
BitGo, one of the largest digital asset custodians in the U.S., helps investors store their digital assets. The company is considering an initial public offering (IPO), according to people familiar with the matter earlier this month. 
BitGo said in a statement on Tuesday that its OTC trading unit will provide spot trading, options trading, and lending services to institutional investors to facilitate margin trading. Since the beginning of last year, the company has begun serving some clients with trading volumes of billions of dollars and lending of more than $100 million. In addition, the trading platform is not only available in the United States, but also covers other jurisdictions including Hong Kong and the Middle East.

data.title: The US SEC has confirmed that it has received Bitwise’s application for a spot XRP ETF
data.description: According to Cointelegraph, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has confirmed that it has received an application from Bitwise for a spot XRP ETF.

data.title: Nigeria reportedly advances crypto tax plan while grappling with Binance dispute
data.description:
Nigeria’s Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is working on a plan to tax crypto transactions as part of a broader effort to increase government revenue, Bloomberg reported on Feb. 18. According to the report, the regulatory body intends to bring eligible crypto transactions on licensed exchanges under the country’s tax framework. Meanwhile, a bill outlining the […]

source: https://cryptoslate.com/nigeria-reportedly-advances-crypto-tax-plan-while-grappling-with-binance-dispute/

data.title: Crypto analytics platform Bubblemaps claims one trader turned $1 million into $109 million trading Trump memecoin
data.description:
Pseudonymous trader Naseem “sniped” the official TRUMP token within a second of it going live, according to onchain data.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/341664/crypto-analytics-platform-bubblemaps-claims-one-trader-turned-1-million-into-109-million-trading-trump-memecoin?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
